name: TOREX GOLD RES INC.
summary: Torex Gold Resources Inc. is a Canadian-based gold producer engaged in the exploration, development, and operation of its Morelos Property, an area of approximately 29,000 hectares in the highly prospective Guerrero Gold Belt located 180 kilometers southwest of Mexico City. The company's main asset is the El Limon Guajes Mine. Torex Gold Resources is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
